reforms.description: Belgium aims to foster business spending on research and development by improving the efficiency of public support mechanisms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing business investment in R&D is expected to enhance innovation capacity and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform package includes measures to improve public support for R&D.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it targets the enhancement of public support for R&D, which is crucial for driving innovation in the private sector.
reforms.source_quote: The reform package includes measures to improve public support for R&D.

reforms.description: Belgium's regional investment companies provide a range of financial support including seed financing, start-ups, and lending for innovation and sustainability initiatives, supported by EU funds.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances access to finance for innovative startups, fostering entrepreneurship and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The regional investment companies are actively providing financial support.
reforms.importance_rationale: Significant support for startups and innovation, contributing to the overall entrepreneurial ecosystem in Belgium.
reforms.source_quote: Belgium's three regional investment companies provide a range of financial support including seed financing, start-ups and lending for innovation and sustainability initiatives.

reforms.description: The 'IRA-SMA' initiative supports international collaborative research by SMEs, with possible support from approved research centres in Wallonia and/or abroad.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitates access to international research networks, enhancing innovation capabilities of SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative is actively supporting international collaborative research.
reforms.importance_rationale: Promotes international collaboration in research, which is crucial for enhancing the innovation potential of SMEs.
reforms.source_quote: IRA-SMA (Wallonia) supports international collaborative research by SMEs, with possible support from (approved) research centres in Wallonia and/or abroad.

reforms.description: Belgium's national convergence plan for the development of AI includes the establishment of a governance framework for the use of AI in federal public services, aimed at enhancing efficiency and ethical standards in public administration.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The governance framework is expected to improve the efficiency of public services and enhance the ethical use of AI, which can lead to better public sector performance and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The governance framework for AI in public services has been established as part of the national convergence plan.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a governance framework for AI represents a significant step towards integrating advanced technologies in public services, which can enhance operational efficiency and service delivery.
reforms.source_quote: The 2022 national convergence plan for the development of AI envisages the adoption of a governance framework for the use of AI in federal public services.

reforms.description: Belgium is implementing an individual training account that grants every full-time employee in companies with at least 20 workers the right to five training days per year, aimed at improving employability and skills among workers, particularly those from disadvantaged groups.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances the skills of the workforce, thereby improving productivity and employability, which can lead to higher economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The federal government is setting up an individual learning account effective from January 2024.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how training is provided to employees, aiming to enhance overall workforce skills and address disparities in training access.
reforms.source_quote: Since 1 January 2024, every full-time employee in a company with at least 20 workers is granted an individual right to five training days per year.

reforms.description: Belgium's Recovery and Resilience Fund adds EUR 100 million to a EUR 450 million investment plan to build offshore wind capacities, aiming to expand renewable energy production.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in renewable energy infrastructure is expected to enhance energy security and reduce emissions, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The investment plan was detailed in the Recovery and Resilience Fund.
reforms.importance_rationale: The investment plan represents a significant commitment to renewable energy, which is crucial for meeting climate targets and enhancing energy independence.
reforms.source_quote: Belgium’s Recovery and Resilience Fund adds EUR 100 million to a EUR 450 million investment plan to build offshore wind capacities.

reforms.description: The federal government has adopted new adaptation measures aimed at improving knowledge on the probability and size of climate change impacts, including the establishment of the Belgian Climate Centre to facilitate better knowledge transfer from researchers to users.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing knowledge transfer can lead to better-informed decision-making and more effective adaptation strategies, ultimately supporting economic resilience against climate change.
reforms.status_evidence: The federal government adaptation measures adopted in 2023 include initiatives aimed at improving knowledge.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the Belgian Climate Centre represents a significant step towards enhancing the integration of scientific knowledge into policy-making, which is crucial for effective climate adaptation.
reforms.source_quote: The federal government adaptation measures adopted in 2023 include initiatives aimed at improving knowledge on the probability and size of climate change impacts.

reforms.description: The creation of the Climate and Environment Risk Assessment Centre (CERAC) in April 2024 aims to provide a comprehensive assessment of climate risks, enhancing the capacity for informed decision-making in climate adaptation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing comprehensive assessments of climate risks, the CERAC will enable better planning and resource allocation, ultimately supporting economic stability and resilience.
reforms.status_evidence: The creation of the Climate and Environment Risk Assessment Centre (CERAC) in April 2024 is intended to address the need for a more comprehensive assessment of risks.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of CERAC is a significant initiative aimed at improving the understanding of climate risks, which is essential for effective adaptation strategies.
reforms.source_quote: The creation of the Climate and Environment Risk Assessment Centre (CERAC) in April 2024 is intended to address the need for a more comprehensive assessment of risks.

reforms.description: Belgium aims to enhance the innovative capacity and productivity growth of small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) by adopting a whole-of-government approach to reduce administrative and regulatory burdens, thereby supporting startups and firm growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Reducing administrative burdens can facilitate the entry of new firms and enhance the growth potential of existing SMEs, leading to increased productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative is part of a broader strategy to support SMEs and has been publicly announced.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in policy aimed at fostering innovation and productivity in a critical sector of the economy, which is essential for long-term economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: Adopting a whole-of-government approach to reduce the high administrative and regulatory burden on small firms can help to support start-ups and firms’ growth.

reforms.description: Belgium has introduced several reforms aimed at making self-employment more attractive, including reduced social-security contributions and support for young entrepreneurs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These reforms are expected to stimulate entrepreneurship and innovation by lowering barriers for self-employed individuals and encouraging new business formation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been enacted to support self-employment.
reforms.importance_rationale: These reforms represent a significant effort to enhance the entrepreneurial landscape in Belgium, particularly for self-employed individuals, which can lead to increased innovation and job creation.
reforms.source_quote: Several reforms intended to make self-employment more attractive in recent years, with the aim of unleashing untapped entrepreneurial potential.

reforms.description: Belgium offers tax incentives and exemptions targeted at startups and scale-ups, including the 'tax shelter' schemes for investors, which provide significant tax reductions for investments in qualifying startup shares.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These tax incentives are designed to stimulate investment in innovative firms, thereby fostering entrepreneurship and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax shelter schemes for startups have been actively promoted and utilized since their introduction.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how Belgium supports new and innovative businesses, which is crucial for enhancing the startup ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: Belgium offers tax incentives and exemptions targeted at startups and scale-ups, including the 'tax shelter' schemes for investors.

reforms.description: In 2023, the federal government launched a 'Female Entrepreneurship' plan aimed at enhancing access to finance for female entrepreneurs through various measures, including better data collection and mobilizing banks and private investors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving access to finance for female entrepreneurs, the plan aims to unlock untapped entrepreneurial potential, which can lead to increased economic activity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan was officially launched with various measures already in place.
reforms.importance_rationale: The plan represents a significant effort to address gender disparities in entrepreneurship, which can have meaningful impacts on economic growth and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: In 2023 the federal government launched a 'Female Entrepreneurship' plan, encompassing numerous measures to enhance the access to finance for female entrepreneurs.

reforms.description: Belgium's public support for business R&D spending is generous, but a reform is recommended to better target small and innovative firms, which currently receive a disproportionately low share of R&D tax incentives.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Targeting support towards small and innovative firms can enhance their R&D activities, leading to increased innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: A reform of R&D support should be considered, as recommended in past Economic Surveys of Belgium.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform addresses systemic issues in the allocation of R&D support, aiming for a more equitable distribution that can significantly enhance innovation across the economy.
reforms.source_quote: To better support SMEs and improve the efficiency of public innovation support, a reform of R&D support should be considered.

reforms.description: Belgium has introduced the 'Tax Shelter for start-ups and scale-ups' to encourage private investment in young SMEs, mobilizing around EUR 210 million for 2,500 firms, primarily in the ICT sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The measure aims to enhance access to finance for innovative firms, thereby fostering their growth and potential for innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The measure has mobilized significant investment for young SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to improve financing options for startups, which is crucial for their development and innovation capacity.
reforms.source_quote: The 'Tax Shelter for start-ups and scale-ups' was introduced to encourage private taxpayers to invest in young SMEs.

reforms.description: Belgium's Labour Deal, enacted in October 2023, entitles employees to 5 days of training per year, although companies with fewer than 10 employees are exempt. This law aims to enhance workforce skills but may deter small firms from expanding beyond 9 employees.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: While it promotes employee training, the exemption for micro firms may discourage growth and hiring.
reforms.status_evidence: The law was enacted in October 2023.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant policy change aimed at improving workforce skills across the country, with implications for small business growth and employee development.
reforms.source_quote: The law, enacted in October 2023, entitles employees to 5 days of training per year, except for companies with fewer than 10 employees.

reforms.description: Belgium's regional governments have implemented various tools to encourage employee training in SMEs, including financial aid measures like the SME e-wallet in Flanders and training cheques in Wallonia.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives provide financial support for training, enhancing the skills of the workforce and promoting innovation in SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: A range of tools are used to encourage employee training in SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: These measures represent a significant effort to enhance workforce skills in SMEs, contributing to overall economic growth and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: A range of tools are used. For example, the 'Flanders Innovation and Entrepreneurship – VLAIO', measures include the SME e-wallet, that provides financial aid to entrepreneurs for investing in workforce skills development.
